title: BrainRot Quiz Battle
shortDescription: Test your brainrot knowledge! Quiz with memes, tech & science 🧠
fullDescription:
How brainrot are you? 🧠💀 Find out in the ULTIMATE quiz battle!

BrainRot Quiz Battle is THE trivia game for anyone who's been chronically online. Think you know your memes from your dreams? Your sigma from your ligma? Your skibidi from your Fibonacci? It's time to prove it. 🔥

🎯 20+ MIND-MELTING QUESTIONS
We've cooked up questions across 4 categories that'll make your brain go brrr. From obscure internet lore to actual science facts disguised as brainrot — can you tell what's real and what's cap?

🏆 4 EPIC CATEGORIES
• 💻 Tech — Do you actually know how the internet works, or do you just use it?
• 🌐 Internet Culture — Memes, trends, lore. Only true brainrot survivors will ace this.
• 🔬 Science — Plot twist: science is lowkey bussin. No cap.
• 🎮 Gaming — Prove you're not just a casual. Show your gamer knowledge.

⏱️ 15-SECOND TIMER
No googling. No lifelines. Just pure brainpower (or brainrot). Answer before the clock runs out or take the L.

📊 SCORE TRACKING
Track your score, flex on your friends, and find out once and for all who's the most brainrotted in the group chat. 💪

🏅 SHARE YOUR SCORE
Screenshot your results and post them everywhere. Let the world know your brainrot level. Are you a NPC or a main character?

✨ WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT
• Quick rounds — perfect for bus rides, class breaks, or avoiding responsibilities
• Fun for all ages — questions range from easy to "how do you even know that?"
• No account needed — just open and play
• Free to play — no paywalls, no premium BS
• Regular updates — new questions added so it never gets stale

Download now and find out if your brain is fried or fired! 🧠🔥
